Description
Is there a way that we can have a feature enabled to search tags within the My Work search bar. Right now it is currently only a feature in the Search Everything function at the top right of all of the pages. …

posts.author: jmckee1 (James McKee)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Is there a way that we can have a feature enabled to search tags within the My Work search bar. Right now it is currently only a feature in the Search Everything function at the top right of all of the pages.

What are you trying to achieve

We are trying to narrow down tasks tagged as priorities for our operational workflows so people know exactly what they need to be working on every day.
